about.title: About AGROBUSINESS
about.subtitle: A platform built to connect the entire Brazilian agribusiness chain.
about.p1: AGROBUSINESS was born to give rural producers, buyers, stores and agri brands a single place to meet, negotiate and grow together.
about.p2: We bring together marketplace, prices, weather, news, courses and a benefits club in a simple, mobile-first experience made for those who live the field.
about.p3: We are committed to transparency, information security and respect for privacy law — so every user has control over their data and negotiations.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Connect Brazilian agribusiness with technology, transparency and simplicity.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: Be the leading Brazilian agri platform, from field to industry.

values.title: Values
values.desc: Trust, closeness to the producer and continuous evolution.

legal.draftNotice: This text is a draft and must be replaced by the official legal content provided by the responsible attorney. It does not constitute legal advice.

s1.title: 1. Acceptance
s1.body: By using AGROBUSINESS you declare that you have read and agreed to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, do not use the platform.

s2.title: 2. Account & sign-up
s2.body: The user is responsible for the information provided at sign-up and for keeping access credentials confidential.

s3.title: 3. Use of the platform
s3.body: Using the service for unlawful, fraudulent, offensive purposes or in violation of third-party rights is prohibited.

s4.title: 4. Listings & negotiations
s4.body: Negotiations between users are the responsibility of the parties involved. AGROBUSINESS acts as a connection intermediary.

s5.title: 5. Intellectual property
s5.body: All content, brand and software of AGROBUSINESS is protected by copyright and other applicable laws.

s6.title: 6. Changes
s6.body: These Terms may be updated at any time. Please review this page periodically. (Draft — replace with the official legal text.)

s1.title: 1. What data we collect
s1.body: We collect data provided at sign-up (name, email, phone, location, categories of interest) and usage data, in compliance with privacy law.

s2.title: 2. How we use the data
s2.body: We use data to provide the service, personalize the experience, ensure security and comply with legal obligations.

s3.title: 3. Sharing
s3.body: We do not sell personal data. We share only with providers essential to platform operation and where legally required.

s4.title: 4. User rights
s4.body: You can request access, correction, portability or deletion of your data at any time, as per privacy law.

s5.title: 5. Security
s5.body: We adopt technical and organizational measures to protect data against unauthorized access, loss or improper alteration.

s6.title: 6. Contact
s6.body: For questions about this policy, contact us via the official support channel. (Draft — replace with the official legal text.)
